query_normalized: cross-dataset consistency of alpha peak frequency estimates in resting-state eeg neuroscience
rationale: This paper measures EEG microstate features (discrete topographies) for dementia classification, not alpha peak frequency estimates. While it shares the EEG domain and cross-dataset evaluation approach, it addresses a fundamentally different EEG metric (microstates vs. spectral alpha frequency), which constitutes distinct constructs sharing only domain-level keywords.
